title: Snad:GrowableOres Compat
description: Use mixin make ore cane can plant on snad.
body:
**A simple compatibility mod using mixin make ore cane can plant on snad.**   
**Requires Snad and GrowableOres.**  

This mod make ore can can plant on snad.  

![屏幕截图 2026-01-15 181512.png](https://s2.loli.net/2026/01/15/4Crgmdq7HD8MVJA.png)

**For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!**
